caption: A woman with dark hair and a purple and white striped collared shirt is speaking while wearing black over-the-ear headphones. She is positioned in front of a neutral-colored wall with a light-colored curtain partially visible to her left. To her right is a dark-colored flat surface. The woman remains in a centered, medium close-up shot as she talks, with her facial expressions and mouth movements changing slightly as she speaks across the sequence. In the bottom left corner of the scene, the small, white on-screen text "Nancy Benny" is visible. The background and her attire remain constant throughout the clip, with the only significant motion being her speaking and subtle shifts in her posture and head position.
